final_prompt.prompt:
Create a 小红书 UGC-style cover image (vertical, 9:16) for a 素人 creator post featuring a 大疆 Pocket 4 review.

Style/medium: needs a "小书素人媒体 / 素人风格" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 小红书 2020s 素人开箱 vlog cover design, Japanese 手帐 DIY collage zine culture, early 2010s Tumblr flat-lay photography; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a 九宫格 (3×3 grid) layout with the product 大疆 Pocket 4 as the central visual anchor and title text prominently centered
Subject: must include the 大疆 Pocket 4 camera as the hero product, surrounded by lifestyle / unboxing context elements across the 9 panels
Scene/backdrop: must include a casual, everyday 素人 creator environment — desk, soft props, natural light feel
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, approachable, everyday-life atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a soft, youthful, lively palette befitting 素人 小红书 content — exact hues are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "大强pocket4初体验" (large, centered title, cute and differentiated display font — playful, non-standard, high personality)
Constraints: must preserve 九宫格 grid structure visible; title text must be legible and stylistically distinct from generic sans-serif
Avoid: overly polished commercial advertising look; corporate or brand-official visual language
